submenu.lingobridge.label: lingobridge
config.title: lingobridge
config.provider.active.atrans: macOS Apple Translation framework via the atrans CLI.
config.provider.active.transformers: In-process transformers.js (server-less). Install the backend via `lingobridge: Install transformers.js Backend (server-less)…`.
config.protection.enabled.description: Protect code blocks, inline code and URLs from being modified by the translator.
config.protection.targets.description: Per-target protection toggles. Defaults ON: fencedCode, inlineCode, mathBlock, mathInline, htmlInline, autoLink, url, inlineEmphasis, markdownLink, referenceLink, taskList. Defaults OFF: markdownHeading, markdownTable, markdownList, shellCommand, filePath, logLine, diffMarker, identifier.
config.atrans.path.description: Absolute path to the atrans CLI. Empty = auto-detect from PATH and Homebrew defaults.
config.libretranslate.endpoint.descripti: Endpoint of the LibreTranslate server. Start it with `libretranslate --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5000 --load-only ja,en`.
config.transformers.modelMap.description: Per-pair model id overrides. Keys are `<from>-<to>` (e.g. `ja-en`); values are HuggingFace model ids that ship ONNX weights for transformers.js (e.g. `Xenova/opus-mt-ja-en`). Empty = use built-in defaults.
config.transformers.cacheDir.description: Directory for cached ONNX models. Empty = transformers.js default (`~/.cache/huggingface`).
config.transformers.timeoutMs.descriptio: Per-call timeout for the transformers.js provider (milliseconds). First load downloads the model and may need a high value.
config.incremental.enabled.description: Enable incremental (block-diff) translation: only blocks whose content changed are sent to the provider; previous translations are reused via a sidecar `<basename>.<lang>.lb.json`.
config.output.openInNewTab.description: Open the translation result in a new tab. When false, only the panel shows it.
config.statusBar.enabled.description: Show the current document's token count in the Status Bar.
config.input.translateOnEnter.descriptio: Press Enter in the translate panel input to run translation (Shift+Enter inserts a newline).
config.tokenEstimator.engine.description: Token estimator engine. `tiktoken` returns OpenAI-grade exact counts at a small cost.
config.languagePairs.description: Translation language pairs available from the title-bar button, context menu and translate panel. Each entry: `{ "from": "ja", "to": "en", "label": "→ EN" }`.
config.history.enabled.description: Persist recent translations in extension global state (local only, never synced).
config.history.maxEntries.description: Maximum number of recent translations to retain (1-500).
walkthrough.gettingStarted.title: Get Started with lingobridge
walkthrough.gettingStarted.description: Pick an offline translation provider, verify it's ready, and try your first translation.
walkthrough.step.welcome.title: Welcome to lingobridge
walkthrough.step.welcome.description: Follow the 3-step flow from setup to your first translation.
walkthrough.step.pickProvider.title: Pick a provider
walkthrough.step.pickProvider.descriptio:
Choose the translation provider you want to use. Open the setup guide or switch it in settings.
[Open Setup Guide](https://github.com/taogya/lingobridge/blob/main/docs/setup/providers/README.md)
[Open Settings](command:lingobridge.openSettings)
walkthrough.step.checkProviders.title: Check provider status
walkthrough.step.checkProviders.descript:
Run the Check Providers command to see which backends are installed and ready.
[Check provider status](command:lingobridge.checkProviders)
walkthrough.step.firstTranslation.title: Translate something
walkthrough.step.firstTranslation.descri:
Open the translate panel and run your first translation.
[Open the Translate panel](command:lingobridge.focusTranslateView)
